scripts.security:all: npm run security:sql && npm run security:secrets && npm run security:deps
scripts.lint:web: eslint src shared next.config.ts postcss.config.mjs eslint.config.mjs scripts/check-deps-audit.mjs scripts/check-secrets-guard.mjs scripts/check-secrets-guard.test.mjs scripts/check-sql-injection-guard.mjs scripts/check-sql-injection-guard.test.mjs scripts/security-observe.mjs scripts/security-observe-summary.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run lint:web && npm run security:all && npm test && npm run test:security && npm run build
scripts.test:security: npm run test:security:sql && npm run test:security:secrets && npm run test:security:routes
